action_text: Press Escape in the global search box to close the search-context popover
rationale: The global search “Choose search context” popover is likely blocking list controls; closing it will let me use the list’s filter to search by Title on this page.

action_text: Click the Show/Hide filter icon for the report list
rationale: To find the specific report by title within the Reports View/Run list, I should open the list filter so I can filter Title to “Incidents by agent.”

action_text: Open the report in the row whose Title starts with “Inc…”
rationale: Open the only visible report to quickly check if it is the required “Incidents by agent” report or otherwise navigate from there.

action_text: Scroll down within the reports list area
rationale: If more reports are present below the fold, scrolling the list area may reveal the desired “Incidents by agent” report.

action_text: Submit the global search for “incidents by agent”
rationale: If in-page filtering remains unavailable, submitting the already-entered “incidents by agent” via global search can locate the report as a fallback.
